mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, created_at, updated_at FROM app_user WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, created_at, updated_at FROM app_user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, created_at, updated_at FROM app_user WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, created_at, updated_at FROM app_user WHERE phone = #{phone}
SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, created_at, updated_at FROM app_user
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user (username, password, email, phone, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
